metadata.title: Sample analytics notebook
metadata.description: A starter notebook that uses Trino's TPCH connector.

cells.source:
# Sample notebook

This notebook explores the public `tpch.sf1` dataset shipped with Trino.

cells.sql:
SELECT nationkey, COUNT(*) AS customers
FROM tpch.sf1.customer
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY customers DESC
LIMIT 25

cells.prompt: Show the top 5 customers by total order amount in 1995.
